title: Quacked SMP - Server Management Panel
description: Browser-based web panel for full server and player management. Modular features: Land claims, RPG skills & abilities, chat filter, anti-grief, custom dimension, edit mods and do backups. Optional integrations: Votifier, Discord, BlueMap, Simple Voice Chat.
body:
[![Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Rvhoyos/QuackedSMP)](https://github.com/Rvhoyos/QuackedSMP/releases)
![GitHub Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Rvhoyos/QuackedSMP/total)
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1360431?label=CurseForge%20downloads)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quackedsmp)
[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/quackedsmp?label=Modrinth%20downloads)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quackedsmp)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-All%20Rights%20Reserved-red)](LICENSE)


# QuackedSMP - Server Management Panel                                                                                           
                                                            
Drop the JAR and manage your server from a browser. No external tools, no extra software.                                        
                                                                                                                                   
  Run:
  
  `/smp admin setpassword` in-game, then open `http://your-server-ip:8125`. 

  > WARNING: Enabling the panel without a password in the config, opens up the admin dashboard to anyone on your network.
                                                            
## Panel includes:
  - Upload, delete, and manage your mods folder live
  - Create, delete or download your world backups also live from the panel. 
  - Run commands, manage players, edit config
  - Live server metrics and event feed (install spark for more metrics)                                                                                            
   
## **Security**:                                                                                                                     
  - Passwords hashed with PBKDF2-SHA256 (100,000 iterations)
  - 5 failed logins triggers a 5-minute lockout per IP
  - **Put the panel behind a reverse proxy** (Caddy, Nginx) with TLS if your server has a domain 
- -  Otheriwse do not open up the port or your configured password will be sent in plaintext.
- - You can still access the dashboard locally.                                       
   
## Features (all optional) :                                                                                                                     

1.  **Land claiming** with anti-grief. Explosions, fire, lava, and PvP blocked inside claims.
2.  **Custom dimensions** Includes floating-island Ether generation. + Custom portal frames
3.  **Chat filter** with leet-speak detection and progressive auto-mutes.
4.  **VIP system** with bonus claim slots via `/vip add`. Starter and VIP kits + other perks.
5. **Anti X-ray** with ore obfuscation + proximity reveal. 
6. **Regenerate unclaimed chunks** with a single command and clear empty region files off disk
7. Everything about each feature is fully **customizable**.
8. **Cozy** per player optional keep inventory setting and also co-op password locked hardcore sessions.


>This is an opinionated yet flexible set of SMP features with tons of content to unpack, explore and also create on your own with our custom dimensions feature!
                                                                        
                                                            
  ## Integrations: Discord, BlueMap, Votifier, Spark
